_description: Tuning for flaky RF blinds. command_repeat_count fires each move 3 times in sequence (some RF transmitters miss the first command). obstruction_threshold waits for 3 consecutive failures before showing 'obstructed' in the Home app, which avoids false positives from brief network blips. request_timeout_ms keeps Homebridge responsive when the device is unreachable.
name: Bedroom Blinds
